S1 |shortname=Season 1 |image=Rising Championship Season 1 allmode.png |imagedark=Rising Championship Season 1 allmode.png |icon=Rising Championship Season 1 allmode.png |icondarkmode=Rising Championship Season 1 allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=Rising Championship |organizer=Rising Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/rising_esports.ae |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=600000 |country=India |sdate=2025-12-09 |edate=2025-12-11 |rulebook= |twitter= |facebook= |instagram=rising_esports.ae |youtube=@RisingesportsGG |web= |discord= |next=Rising_Championship/Season_2{{!}}Season 2 }} ==About== ===Format=== * '''Pre Quarter Finals:''''' December 1st - 3rd, 2025 ** 64 teams, 3 matchdays. *** 36 qualified teams. *** 28 invited teams. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 team from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' December 4th - 5th, 2025 ** 48 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' December 6th - 8th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 12 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' December 9th - 11th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=250000|{{Opponent|Vasista Esports}} }}
